title: 有馬記念の後に・『最強』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon wins the Arima Kinen, and
endless tears of joy pour from her
once-emotionless eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one expected her to succeed at long-distance
races, but she did her best despite that. Her
struggles and achievements have inspired
courage in countless people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She will hold that pride in her heart forever. But
still, today, too, she sprints off to execute my
orders.
